calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-03-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge Ellen Chaitin., Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, CSR: Karen Held, #2857

MARK HOOSHMAND, Esq. appeared for plaintiff GALEN JONES, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant ABSOLUTELYNEW, INC.
Default was entered against defendant on MAY 5, 2010.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff GALEN JONES, and against the Defaulted Defendant ABSOLUTELYNEW, INC., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $11,945.00; PUNITIVE DAMAGES - $15,000.00; ATTORNEY'S FEES - $1525.00; INTEREST AT 10% PER ANNUM - $3953.00; Costs - $765.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $33,188.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
